heading: Building bridges between people who want to help and kids who need it.
body: Community Assist is a collective of Indonesian businesses, founded by Indosole and PNNY, raising funds to empower local communities through education, environment and opportunity.
Everything we raise goes to our partners' scholarship programs, helping children stay in school and build a future for themselves and their families.
collectiveHeading: Founded by Bali businesses, powered by a foundation.

partners.photoAlt: The Indosole team gathered outside their store in Bali
partners.text: For over 17 years, Indosole has turned discarded tyres and river-collected sandals into recycled footwear, pioneering a future-forward model while creating jobs and community across Indonesia.

partners.photoAlt: The seven artists of the PNNY music collective
partners.text: Established in 2014, PNNY is Bali's home-grown collective of seven artists, curating the music events that have helped shape the island's scene, on both a local and international stage.

partners.photoAlt: Ragam Foundation scholarship students and team at a Community Assist event
partners.text: "Ragam" means diversity. The foundation connects people who want to give with communities who need support, and runs the educational scholarship program that every rupiah you give goes toward.
